channel.title: Sandbox on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Sandbox on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Container Apps Sandboxes
item.description:
Azure Container Apps Sandboxes is in public preview. It is positioned for workloads that need to run untrusted code, retain session state, and absorb bursty demand.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Cloud and local sandboxes for GitHub Copilot now in public preview
item.description:
GitHub Copilot now supports secure, isolated sandboxes for tool execution in both local and cloud environments, available in public preview. The update is intended to isolate Copilot actions from the rest of the system.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Hosted Agents in Foundry Agent Service
item.description:
Azure Foundry Agent Service now offers hosted agents in public preview. Each agent session runs in an isolated sandbox with a clean environment, no shared state, and strong compute boundaries.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: k8s: Running Agents on Kubernetes with Agent Sandbox
item.description:
Kubernetes SIG Apps is developing Agent Sandbox, a new API for singleton, stateful AI agent workloads that need persistent identity, isolation, and suspend/resume behavior. The project adds a Sandbox CRD plus extensions like warm pools to reduce cold starts and support untrusted code execution.

  • Source: Kubernetes Official Blog
